notes: HERMIT's six-face arcana die. Rolled on Threshold Rolls during a Hermit run. KEEP WATCH is the highest success — the watch stays held. DIM is the failure — the wick goes long.

faces.description: Success ★★. The lamp catches. The watch holds. Advance two toward the next log entry or tending.
Success ★. Two clauses on the page. Spend 1 Time, advance one.
Partial. The lens hesitates on Q3. Spend 2 Action cards to convert to ★, or take it (+1 LONELINESS).
Partial. The radio doesn't speak. Spend 2 Action cards to convert to ★, or take it (+1 LONELINESS).
Failure. The wick goes long. +1 LONELINESS. The lamp will, this hour, want for tending.
Wild. ★ if you have LOGGED this turn — the page registers and the watch counts. Otherwise: failure, and the bunk room widens a foot.
